requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — NRCS Letter of Authority and Voltage / Plug Compliance
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——NRCS授权函及电压/插头合规
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——NRCS授權函及電壓/插頭合規

summary.en: Certain electrical products sold in South Africa, including power adapters and chargers supplied with wireless and IoT devices, are subject to compulsory specifications administered by NRCS (National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications). A Letter of Authority (LoA) from NRCS is mandatory before such products can be sold or imported. South Africa uses 220-230 V / 50 Hz supply with Type M (15 A, 3-pin round) as the primary plug standard; Type C and N are also used. Devices and power supplies must be rated and physically compatible for this standard. CCC is not recognised in South Africa.
summary.zh: 在南非销售的某些电气产品，包括无线及物联网设备所附的电源适配器和充电器，须遵守由NRCS（国家强制规格监管机构）管理的强制规格。此类产品在销售或进口前须强制取得NRCS授权函（LoA）。南非使用220-230V/50Hz电源，主要插头标准为M型（15A三孔圆头）；C型和N型在部分场合也有使用。设备及电源须额定并物理兼容上述标准。CCC在南非不被承认。
summary.zht: 在南非銷售的某些電氣產品，包括無線及物聯網裝置所附的電源適配器和充電器，須遵守由NRCS（國家強制規格監管機構）管理的強制規格。此類產品在銷售或進口前須強制取得NRCS授權函（LoA）。南非使用220-230V/50Hz電源，主要插頭標準為M型（15A三孔圓頭）；C型和N型在部分場合也有使用。裝置及電源須額定並物理相容上述標準。CCC在南非不被承認。

standards_or_laws: National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications Act No. 5 of 2008 (South Africa)
Compulsory Specification VC 8055 — Plugs, Socket-Outlets and Adaptors (South Africa)
IEC 62368-1 (as adopted via applicable SANS standards)

summary.en: In China, electrical safety for IoT and wireless devices with a power supply is covered under CCC (China Compulsory Certification) per GB 4943.1 (IEC 62368-1 equivalent) and GB 8898, administered by CNCA and tested by designated laboratories. Chinese mains supply is 220 V / 50 Hz (voltage-compatible) but the plug standard (GB 1002, Type I-equivalent flat-pin) differs from South Africa Type M. CCC is not recognised in South Africa.
summary.zh: 在中国，带电源的物联网和无线设备的电气安全须依据GB 4943.1（对应IEC 62368-1）及GB 8898进行强制性产品认证（CCC），由CNCA管理，经指定实验室测试。中国电网电压为220V/50Hz（电压兼容），但插头标准（GB 1002扁头插头）与南非M型不同。CCC在南非不被承认。
summary.zht: 在中國，帶電源的物聯網和無線裝置的電氣安全須依據GB 4943.1（對應IEC 62368-1）及GB 8898進行強制性產品認證（CCC），由CNCA管理，經指定實驗室測試。中國電網電壓為220V/50Hz（電壓相容），但插頭標準（GB 1002扁頭插頭）與南非M型不同。CCC在南非不被承認。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — GB 4943.1 / IEC 62368-1 equivalent
GB 8898 (China) — Safety of Audio, Video and IT Equipment
GB 1002 (China) — Plugs and Socket-Outlets for Household and Similar Use

gap.en: NRCS LoA is mandatory for in-scope electrical products (including power adapters) before import or sale in South Africa. Chinese CCC is not recognised. Devices and power supplies must be rated for 220-230 V / 50 Hz and physically compatible with South Africa Type M / C / N plug standards. Separate NRCS evaluation is required.
gap.zh: 特定范围内的电气产品（包括电源适配器）在进口或于南非销售前须强制取得NRCS授权函（LoA）。中国CCC不被承认。设备及电源须额定220-230V/50Hz，并与南非M/C/N型插头标准物理兼容。须进行独立的NRCS评估。
gap.zht: 特定範圍內的電氣產品（包括電源適配器）在進口或於南非銷售前須強制取得NRCS授權函（LoA）。中國CCC不被承認。裝置及電源須額定220-230V/50Hz，並與南非M/C/N型插頭標準物理相容。須進行獨立的NRCS評估。

source.publisher: NRCS — National Regulator for Compulsory Specifications

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A NRCS Letter of Authority is mandatory for in-scope electrical products including power adapters sold in South Africa. Chinese CCC certification is not recognised. Devices must be designed for 220-230 V / 50 Hz and South African Type M / C / N plug standards; Chinese CCC and flat-pin plugs do not satisfy these requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在南非销售的特定范围内的电气产品（包括电源适配器）须强制取得NRCS授权函。中国CCC认证不被承认。设备须针对220-230V/50Hz及南非M/C/N型插头标准进行设计；中国CCC认证和扁头插头不满足上述要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在南非銷售的特定範圍內的電氣產品（包括電源適配器）須強制取得NRCS授權函。中國CCC認證不被承認。裝置須針對220-230V/50Hz及南非M/C/N型插頭標準進行設計；中國CCC認證和扁頭插頭不滿足上述要求。
